stories.title: Trump says new talks with Iran will happen soon. And, Eric Swalwell faces new allegations
stories.summary: President Trump says new talks with Iran could happen in the next two days. And, Democrat Eric Swalwell faces new allegations as a second woman comes forward accusing him of rape.

stories.title: Trump says peace talks could resume in days as U.S. military blocks Iranian ports
stories.summary: President Trump said a second round of direct U.S.-Iran peace talks could resume in Pakistan within the next two days, even as he instituted a naval blockade of all Iranian ports.

stories.title: Italy suspends long-standing defence agreement with Israel
stories.summary: Italy suspended the renewal of a 20-year-long defence agreement with Israel, following recent tensions between them.

stories.title: Iran citizen held in France over pro-Palestine comments returns home
stories.summary: Release of Mahdieh Esfandiari comes a week after Iran released two French citizens held on espionage charges.

stories.title: North Korea boosting ability to manufacture nuclear arms, IAEA chief warns
stories.summary: The nuclear watchdog's chief says there is a rapid increase in operations at North Korea's Yongbyon reactor.

stories.title: As fuel prices continue to rise, Iran war drives Europe toward new crisis
stories.summary: As fuel protests bring Ireland to a standstill and UK leaders decry price hikes driven by the Iran war, Europe -- barely recovered from the energy shock of the Ukraine war -- faces another crisis.

stories.title: IMF predicts Iran war will slow economic growth and raise inflation globally
stories.summary: The International Monetary Fund expects the Iran war to slow the global economy and raise inflation. NPR's Michel Martin discusses the forecast with Simon Johnson, a former IMF chief economist.

stories.title: Palestinian leader Barghouti endures ‘violent’ assaults in Israeli prisons
stories.summary: Recent reports of prison brutality follow an attack last year that resulted in broken ribs and head injuries.

stories.title: ‘Food is unifying’: How Lebanon’s migrants are feeding the war-displaced
stories.summary: Often overlooked in Lebanon's society, the migrant community is filling the gaps of the state by feeding their own.

stories.title: Israel and Lebanon hold direct talks for first time in decades
stories.summary: After the first direct talks in decades, Israel and Lebanon have agreed to begin negotiations.
